summary: Comprehensive backend pytest for the Phase 2 Edit Request workflow (create/cancel/resolve) plus integration with PATCH /edit-fields and regression of prior endpoints. 21/22 new tests passed (1 skipped: drilling-protocol PDF route-path unknown). Iteration 103 regression suite also re-ran green (10/10).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py phase2-edit-request creation uses datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat() for requested_at but datetime.utcnow() (naive) for notifications.created_at — harmless but inconsistent; pick one.
Allowed-fields filter silently drops unknown field names (e.g. 'foo'). Consider returning 400 instead of silently trimming, so the UI doesn't think it saved what the user typed.

Cancel endpoint returns {ok, status} while resolve endpoint returns the full updated request doc implicitly via None/unset — responses are asymmetric. Consider returning the updated request doc from both for UI parity.
No pagination/limit on phase2_edit_requests[] on the procedure doc; if a case churns many requests the embedded array grows unbounded. Fine for now but worth a TODO.
Resolve endpoint does not verify that the assigned in-charge is the one on the procedure (any implant_incharge can resolve). Intentional per spec but worth documenting.
test_credentials: Admin: Abhijit.patil/Admin@123 · Student: Gaurav.pandey/Student@123 · Supervisor: Paresh.gandhi/Supervisor@123
seed_data_creation: Created several pending/cancelled/resolved entries on procedure 69cf9bdfdafb502718057bcd as expected by-product of the test flow. Notes all prefixed with 'TEST_iter104'. No data cleanup attempted because the workflow is append-only (status flipped to cancelled/resolved in-place).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_phase2_edit_request_iteration104.py. Candidate procedure: 69cf9bdfdafb502718057bcd (Gaurav.pandey owned, phase2_data persisted, Paresh.gandhi assigned supervisor, Abhijit.patil assigned in-charge). The suite is idempotent — it cancels any leftover pending request at the start of each sub-test that creates a new one. Drilling-protocol PDF route path was not discovered under the usual names; main agent should share the exact endpoint path if they want that assertion fail-fast instead of skip. No backend issues surfaced; the three endpoints honour all role/ownership/state guards and the /edit-fields integration correctly logs phase2_data.prosthesis_type changes in edit_log.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bug reproduced. All spec requirements (403 non-student create, 403 foreign-role cancel, 403 student resolve, 400 empty payload, 400 phase2 not submitted, 409 duplicate pending, 404 unknown procedure/request, 400 repeat resolve/cancel, notifications + edit_log + persistence) verified.
